name: homestead-helper
description: Homestead Helper is a practical MVP web app for new and experienced homesteaders. It focuses on three day-to-day decisions:

scripts.build:web: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html styles.css app.js dist/
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run build:web && npx cap copy android
